packet_label: ThirdPerson human inputs on 2026-04-19 local time

selected_events.explicit_request: Fix the editor PIE driver so proof stays alive long enough to finish.

selected_events.explicit_request: Reopen the default-lane defect about floating feet and poor lower-body readability.

selected_events.explicit_request: Track the runtime-only remaining defects on the human default lane.

selected_events.explicit_request: Add the third runtime defect: both feet hover above the ground.
selected_events.selection_reason: Makes the packet's runtime concern more specific and separates contact/grounding from shape/readability.

selected_events.explicit_request: Continue the default-lane fix after the MaxSpeed and mesh-Z retune still failed.
selected_events.selection_reason: Shows the need for deeper root-cause tracing after a plausible but incomplete fix attempt.
